action.text: declare @n int, @i int, @l int, @o int, @rsl varchar(32), @rtl varchar(32), @rHeader nvarchar(512) -- select @rsl = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ip_sl' select @rtl = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ip_tl' select @rHeader = case when @@language = 'V' then N'Tỷ lệ' else N'Rate' end -- select top 0 cast(0 as int) as stt, cast(0 as int) as lvl, cast(0 as int) as ref, ma_sp, ma_vt, dvt, he_so, cast(0 as numeric(13, 4)) as tl_hh, cast(0 as numeric(24, 12)) as so_luong, 0 as xmaster, 0 as xdetail into #ctsx from ctsx insert into #ctsx exec rs_GetMaterialsFromBOMByProduct null, @code if exists(select 1 from #ctsx) begin select @l = max(lvl), @o = len(rtrim(max(stt))) from #ctsx select ref, min(stt) as stt into #g from #ctsx group by ref select a.stt, a.lvl, a.ref, case when a.lvl <> 0 then (a.stt - c.stt + 1) else 0 end as stt2, cast('' as varchar(64)) as id, a.xmaster, a.xdetail, rtrim(a.ma_vt) + char(255) + ';' + case when @@language = 'V' then dbo.FastBusiness$Function$EncodeHtml(b.ten_vt) else dbo.FastBusiness$Function$EncodeHtml(b.ten_vt2) end + char(255) + ';' + case when so_luong = 0 then '' else dbo.ff_NumberFormat(rtrim(so_luong), @rsl) end + char(255) + ';' + rtrim(a.dvt) + char(255) + ';' + case when tl_hh = 0 then '' else @rHeader end + char(255) + ';' + case when tl_hh = 0 then '' else dbo.ff_NumberFormat(rtrim(tl_hh), @rtl) end as name into #r0 from #ctsx a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt join #g c on a.ref = c.ref update #r0 set id = rtrim(stt) where xmaster = 1 and xdetail = 0 select @i = 1 while (@i <= @l) begin update #r0 set id = rtrim(b.id) + rtrim(a.stt2) from #r0 a left join (select stt, stt2, id from #r0) b on a.ref = b.stt where a.lvl = @i -- select @i = @i + 1 end select @n = max(len(rtrim(id))) from #r0 select '' as array$, xmaster, xdetail, replace(str(stt, @o), ' ', '0') as stt, lvl, replace(str(ref, @o), ' ', '0') as ref, rtrim(id) + replace(space(@n - len(id)), ' ', '0') as id, name, @l as lvlMax from #r0 order by lvl, ref, stt end else select 0 as value return

query.text: exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding @@id, @@master, @@prime, @@inquiry, @@partition, @@expression, @@increase, @@extension, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @@keyMaster, @@keyDetail, 'stt_rec', @@textList, @@textExternal, 'a left join dmvt b on a.ma_sp = b.ma_vt left join dmbp c on a.ma_bp = c.ma_bp', @@textOrderBy, @@admin, @@userID, @@viewAccessMode, null, null, '', '', '', @user_id0, '', 1, default, default, default, default, default

title.v: Cấu trúc nguyên vật liệu$Cấu trúc...$90
